case_title: TSUEI MARK VS SIXTH AVENUE AQUARIUM

docket_entries.description: POS ON SIXTH AVE.AQUARIUM DOES NOT SHOW WHO WAS SERVED.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TSUEI MARK IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT SIXTH AVENUE AQUARIUM STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
